query:
SELECT 'Total Users' as metric, CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) as value FROM users
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Users with Stripe Customer', CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) FROM users WHERE stripeCustomerId IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Active Subscriptions', CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'active'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Subscriptions (all time)', CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) FROM subscriptions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Subscription Plans Breakdown', GROUP_CONCAT(plan, ': ', cnt ORDER BY cnt DESC SEPARATOR ' | ') FROM (SELECT plan, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY plan) t
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Top-up Purchases', CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) FROM topupPurchases
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Top-up Revenue (GBP pence)', CAST(COALESCE(SUM(amountPaid), 0) AS CHAR) FROM topupPurchases
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Music Video Jobs', CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) FROM musicVideoJobs
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Completed Jobs', CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) FROM musicVideoJobs WHERE status = 'completed'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Failed Jobs', CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) FROM musicVideoJobs WHERE status = 'failed'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Rendering Jobs', CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) FROM musicVideoJobs WHERE status = 'rendering'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Credit Transactions', CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) FROM creditTransactions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Credits Purchased (purchase type)', CAST(COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS CHAR) FROM creditTransactions WHERE type = 'purchase';
